title: Grastidium leontoglossum
taxonomy: Grastidium leontoglossum is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It belongs to the genus Grastidium and is a type of grass. Within the Poaceae family, Grastidium leontoglossum is classified in the subfamily Aristidoideae. The exact classification of Grastidium leontoglossum may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered to be a member of the grass family. Further classification may involve specific orders and tribes within the Poaceae family.
